integration_metadata.user_purpose: Team communication, code review coordination, deployment announcements

chat_records.title: PR review request: week 1 changes
chat_records.summary: Desmond requested Bob Kim to review PR #5 for microbots enrichment layer. Bob agreed to review that day.
chat_records.content:
Desmond: @bob PR #5 is ready for review — microbots enrichment layer.
Bob Kim: On it. Will review today.

chat_records.title: Deploy: microbots v0.3 to staging
chat_records.summary: Desmond deployed microbots v0.3 to staging with Alice Chen approving. All smoke tests passed.
chat_records.content:
Desmond: Deploying microbots v0.3 to staging now. Linear: MIC-30.
Alice Chen: Looks good from infra side. Green light.
Desmond: Deployed. All smoke tests passing.

chat_records.title: Week 1: microbots SurrealDB progress
chat_records.summary: Desmond pushed schema updates for week 1 with HNSW indexes. Bob confirmed embedding dimension (1536) matches OpenAI embeddings.
chat_records.content:
Desmond: Pushed schema updates for week 1. HNSW indexes are looking good.
Bob Kim: Nice! Did you verify the embedding DIMENSION matches?
Desmond: Yes, 1536 — matches the OpenAI embeddings. All green.
